meta.title: The characterization of neutralizing and non-neutralizing monoclonal antibodies against equid herpesvirus type 1 -- Sinclair et al. 70 (2): 455 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: Seven monoclonal antibodies (MAbs) were produced which recognized equid herpesvirus type 1 (EHV-1). Three MAbs neutralized the subtype 1 virus (strain Army 183) in the presence of complement, but did not neutralize the subtype 2 virus (strain MD). All three MAbs immunoprecipitated an Mr 83K glycoprotein from a detergent-solubilized virion envelope preparation of the subtype 1 virus. The target antigens of the four non- neutralizing MAbs (6F11, 2A4, 1F10 and 8D9) were identified by immunoblotting against purified EHV-1 virions and had respective apparent Mr values of greater than 205K, greater than 205K, 97K and 13K.
